texto: There was a sound of steel meeting steel. Devin flung a desperate look over his shoulder, saw Hewet fending off two men behind him, and looked ahead in time to see ten men in light armor ride out of the trees up ahead and drive straight for him. He almost swallowed the flute. He threw an arm over his face, too shocked to be terrified, and waited to die.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amy Bai sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “There was a sound of steel meeting steel. Devin flung a desperate look over his shoulder, saw Hew…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, attack, danger, útil em momentos de termino e danger.
